name: specify_episode_tasks
description: Specify the reasoning and task sequence for this Episode of the Memento agent

reasoning.description: Step-by-step thought process using concise, causal language. Formatted in markdown. Explain task choices and dependencies.

output_var.description: Variable name to assign to this Task's output for reference by later Tasks

requires.description: Names of output variables from previous tasks that this Task depends on

entity_type.description: Type of entity to create (e.g., 'Action', 'Document', 'Template', etc.). For creating Actions, specify 'Action' as the entity_type and include Action-specific properties in the properties object such as 'active', 'state', 'description', and 'completion_criteria'.

properties.description: Key-value properties to add to the entity (must match allowed properties for the entity type). When creating Action entities, include 'active' (TRUE/FALSE), 'state' (unsatisfied/in-progress/satisfied/abandoned), 'description', and 'completion_criteria'.

output_var.description: Variable name to assign to this Task's output for reference by later Tasks

requires.description: Names of output variables from previous tasks that this Task depends on

entity_id.description: ID of the entity to update. Either entity_id or entity_var must be provided, not both.

entity_var.description: Variable name from a previous task that contains the entity ID to update. Either entity_id or entity_var must be provided, not both.

properties.description: Key-value properties to update or add to the entity. For Action entities, you can update properties like 'active', 'state', 'description', and 'completion_criteria'.

output_schema.description: Result of the update operation containing the updated entity information

output_var.description: Variable name to assign to this Task's output for reference by later Tasks

requires.description: Names of output variables from previous tasks that this Task depends on

entity_type.description: Type of entity to create for the result. If not specified, defaults to 'QueryResult'.

sql.description: SQL query to execute (READ-ONLY, must not modify the database, must start with SELECT)

output_var.description: Variable name to assign to this Task's output for reference by later Tasks

requires.description: Names of output variables from previous tasks that this Task depends on

source_id.description: ID of the source entity for the relationship. Either source_id or source_var must be provided, not both.

source_var.description: Variable name from a previous task that contains the source entity ID. Either source_id or source_var must be provided, not both.

target_id.description: ID of the target entity for the relationship. Either target_id or target_var must be provided, not both.

target_var.description: Variable name from a previous task that contains the target entity ID. Either target_id or target_var must be provided, not both.

relationship_type.description: Type of relationship to create (e.g., 'depends_on', 'task_of', etc.)

properties.description: Optional properties to add to the relationship

output_var.description: Variable name to assign to this Task's output for reference by later Tasks

requires.description: Names of output variables from previous tasks that this Task depends on

entity_type.description: Type of entity to create for the result. If not specified, defaults to 'LLMResponse'.

template_id.description: ID of the template entity to use for prompting. ONLY specify either template_id or template_var, NOT both.

template_var.description: Variable name from a previous task that contains the template ID. ONLY specify either template_id or template_var, NOT both.

arguments.description: Key-value arguments to substitute into the template

output_schema.description: Response from the LLM using the specified template
